name: Chocolate-Peppermint Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease an 8 x 8 x 2-inch pan.
2. Make Bottom Layer: Melt chocolate and butter together over hot water, cooling slightly.
3. In a medium bowl, beat egg until frothy. Stir in chocolate mixture and granulated sugar. Add flour and walnuts, stirring until well blended.
4. Turn batter into prepared pan; bake 15 minutes. Cool thoroughly on a wire rack.
5. Make Filling: In a small bowl, blend all filling ingredients. Spread over the cookie layer. Refrigerate at least 10 minutes.
6. Make Glaze: Combine all glaze ingredients, stirring until smooth. Spread evenly over the filling. Refrigerate 15 minutes to harden glaze.
7. With a sharp knife, cut into bars.
